name: paeonol
summary: Phenolic ketone associated with inflammatory and antioxidant-response signaling.
description: Paeonol is a phenolic compound with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory signaling potential, influencing stress-response pathways relevant to inflammatory cytokine regulation.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
